title: PM Domain Field Matrix Draft Packet History Demotion Execution
objective: Normalize the remaining live-looking 2026-04-12 PM domain field-matrix packet-definition singleton so that file no longer presents itself as a still-live PM-domain field-candidate authoring packet after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with an explicit current-routing redirect.
dependency_note: After Packet 210 closed the remaining 2026-04-15 PM UI packet-definition family, the nearest remaining current-looking residue in the older PM draft lane is the foundational `pm-schema-001` field-matrix singleton. Its surrounding packet-history now serves only as provenance, so the packet-definition JSON itself is the strongest adjacent live-looking residue.
execution_scope: Retitle the `pm-schema-001` packet-definition singleton as historical provenance.
Add explicit `historical_note` and `current_routing` fields to the packet JSON.
Preserve the original packet body below those top-entry routing fields without reopening runtime, planning, or implementation scope.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing normalization
success_criteria: The `pm-schema-001` packet-definition singleton now reads as historical provenance instead of a live PM-domain field-candidate authoring packet.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and leaves no ambiguity about the next remaining adjacent residue check.
next_action: Close the adjacent `pm-schema-002` singleton so the next remaining PM-domain foundational residue is explicit after the `pm-schema-001` closure.
